proposedStories.title: Introduce STokenLoginBoundary component
proposedStories.summary: New component, generalized endpoint-resolve hook, extend tokenLogin helper with extraParams (pending Open Question 1), default fallback + error card UI, unit tests.

proposedStories.title: Migrate LoginView sToken path to STokenLoginBoundary
proposedStories.summary: Replace connectUsingSession sToken branch (lines 455–490 of LoginView.tsx) with boundary wrapping; move post-login side effects to onSuccess callback.

proposedStories.title: Migrate EduAppLauncher sToken path to STokenLoginBoundary
proposedStories.summary: Remove _token_login and manual backend-ai-connected dispatch; wrap stepper auth step with boundary; supply errorFallback for stepper-integrated error UI; strip sToken from URL (behavior change).

resolvedOpenQuestions.Q1_tokenLogin_extension: extend (option a) — add optional extraParams arg to tokenLogin helper
resolvedOpenQuestions.Q2_loadConfigFromWebServer: exclude — caller may invoke inside onSuccess if needed
resolvedOpenQuestions.Q4_errorFallback_fallthrough: errorFallback wins for all kinds when provided
resolvedOpenQuestions.Q6_concurrent_session_detection: defer — emit unknown kind with TODO
resolvedOpenQuestions.Q8_eduapp_sToken_reuse: default option (a) prop-threading; FR-2640 first verifies if option (d) deletion applies

notes: Epic FR-2616 filed. Spec Task FR-2618 + Story 1-3 (FR-2625, FR-2626, FR-2627). Story 1: PRs #6850-#6853, #6855-#6857 (7 PRs). Story 2: PR #6861 bundles FR-2636/2637/2638 (LoginView migration). Story 3: PR #6864 bundles FR-2641/2642 (EduAppLauncher migration). Q8 (FR-2640) resolved via prop-threading, no PR. E2E (FR-2639, FR-2643): PR #6865 bundles both. FR-2634 (CI grep rule) closed as redundant with FR-2633 test. FR-2635 (cookie encoding investigation) closed. Directory still uses draft- prefix; rename to FR-2616-stoken-login-boundary as a follow-up after spec PR merges.
